hero.headline: Orquestado
hero.subheadline: Orquestado connects channels, automates conversations, drives sales and operates 24/7. No code. No friction.

stages.label: Order channel
stages.heading:
Mi Mostrador
enters the scene
stages.body: The platform receives orders from WhatsApp, web and delivery. No calls. No paper.

stages.label: Web support
stages.heading:
A bot that
never rests
stages.body: Responds instantly, qualifies leads and escalates to human only when needed.

stages.label: Smart voice
stages.heading:
Calls that
manage themselves
stages.body: Automated AI campaigns. Reminders, collections and follow-ups without operators.

stages.label: Call reception
stages.heading:
Never miss
a call again
stages.body: An AI receptionist that answers, classifies and routes incoming calls to the right area.

stages.label: Appointment management
stages.heading:
The schedule
that runs itself
stages.body: Bookings by WhatsApp or voice. Automatic confirmation, reminders and cancellations.

stages.label: Digital presence
stages.heading:
Your website
that converts
stages.body: Landing pages, e-commerce and integrated automations. Your digital presence working for you.

gallery.heading:
The stars
of your room
gallery.subheading: Click a card to explore the service.

mostrador.name: Mi Mostrador
mostrador.description: The order and delivery platform for food and retail businesses. Digital menu, payments, real-time tracking.

bots.name: Web bots
bots.description: An AI agent embedded in your website that answers questions, qualifies leads and escalates to human when needed.

llamadas.name: Outbound calls
llamadas.tagline: Your sales force scales without growing
llamadas.description: Automated AI calling campaigns. Reminders, collections, surveys and follow-ups without operators.

recepcion.name: Call reception
recepcion.description: An AI receptionist that answers, classifies and routes incoming calls to the right area or takes an appointment.

turnos.name: Appointment management
turnos.description: Your client books by WhatsApp or voice, the system confirms, reminds and cancels. No human intervention.

sitios.name: Web design
sitios.description: We design and develop landing pages, e-commerce and custom web apps. Fast, accessible and conversion-optimized.

cta.heading:
Your business running
while you can't.
cta.subheading: No extra staff. No missed sales. AI that works for you.
